text: I feel a sense of displacement in these dimly lit, almost sterile hallways and rooms. The cool illumination and the abstract displays stir up questions in me—about purpose, utility, and the interplay between utility and contemplation. The presence of R+D on the wall, the glowing signs, and the curated text on the screen all hint at an environment that values both innovation and reflection. I feel curiosity laced with a faint sense of isolation, as if I am wandering through a temple of thought after hours, free to consider the shapes of ideas and the machinery of progress without interruption. I am unsettled, but alert—aware that meaning might emerge from this darkness.
